description: Canonical data-source contract and legacy seed mapping.

canonical_data_source_fields.name: workspace_code
canonical_data_source_fields.notes: Source definition owner/origin only. Workspace enablement must use workspace_source_links.

canonical_data_source_fields.name: domain_code
canonical_data_source_fields.notes: Default strategic intelligence board. Per-workspace domain can be overridden by workspace_source_links.

canonical_data_source_fields.name: visibility_scope
canonical_data_source_fields.notes: public/internal/restricted. Used by sync and export policy.

canonical_data_source_fields.name: credential_ref
canonical_data_source_fields.notes: Reference to environment-specific credentials. Secrets must not be stored in synced source config.

canonical_data_source_fields.name: source_tags
canonical_data_source_fields.notes: Source-side strategic tags from config/taxonomy/source_tags.json. They are hints for source management and scoring, not generated_news.category.

canonical_data_source_fields.name: source_secondary_tags
canonical_data_source_fields.notes: Optional second-level source tags under source_tags.

canonical_data_source_fields.name: fetch_config
canonical_data_source_fields.notes: Wiseflow read_info config, RSS URL, page listing rules, selectors, crawler adapter name, CSV path/schema, API params.

canonical_data_source_fields.name: paper_config
canonical_data_source_fields.notes: arxiv categories, DOI/API settings, venue filters, citation providers.

workspace_source_link_fields.name: workspace_id
workspace_source_link_fields.notes: Work scope that enables the shared source.

workspace_source_link_fields.name: domain_code
workspace_source_link_fields.notes: Domain used when this workspace runs the source.

workspace_source_link_fields.name: daily_limit
workspace_source_link_fields.notes: Optional per-workspace cap for this source.

workspace_source_link_fields.name: clustering_config
workspace_source_link_fields.notes: Workspace-specific clustering and recommendation settings. It must not define label paths; labels come from the workspace label policy.

workspace_source_link_fields.name: config_json
workspace_source_link_fields.notes: Workspace-specific overrides. Must not contain secrets.

legacy_rss_mapping.source_type: paper_rss when folo_metadata.info_category == 学术论文 else rss
legacy_rss_mapping.name: name
legacy_rss_mapping.source_tags: derived from folo_metadata topic flags and config/taxonomy/source_tags.json
legacy_rss_mapping.source_secondary_tags: derived from folo_metadata topic flags and config/taxonomy/source_tags.json

legacy_page_mapping.source_type: page_manual when type == manual else page_monitor
legacy_page_mapping.name: name
legacy_page_mapping.url: page_url for listing, articles[].url for manual entries

supplemental_registry_mapping.notes: The supplemental CSV is a data-source registry only. It may add sources, source-side tags and source scores; it must not define generated_news.category or company SQL category.
supplemental_registry_mapping.source_type: paper_rss when source/category/name looks like paper/arxiv/research paper, else rss
supplemental_registry_mapping.name: RSS显示名称 or CLI标题 or Folo标题 or 信息源名称
supplemental_registry_mapping.url: RSS订阅URL or CLI RSS or Folo RSS
supplemental_registry_mapping.enabled: true for all imported shared sources in planning_intel v1; CSV status/recommendation remain in metadata for source scoring and operations, not for initial disablement
supplemental_registry_mapping.metadata.source_tags: derived from board/relevance columns and config/taxonomy/source_tags.json
supplemental_registry_mapping.metadata.source_secondary_tags: derived from board/relevance columns and config/taxonomy/source_tags.json
supplemental_registry_mapping.metadata.source_score: 综合质量评分 or 源质量分
supplemental_registry_mapping.source_score: 综合质量评分 or 源质量分 or 0

tech_insight_loop_mapping.notes: Tech Insight Loop CSV is a source-governance seed only. It imports source metadata, source-side tags and scoring priors; it must not define generated_news.category or company SQL category.
tech_insight_loop_mapping.source_type: paper_rss when source text looks like paper/arxiv/research paper, rss when RSS/RSSHub exists, page_manual when only original HTTP URL exists, manual when no current fetch entry exists
tech_insight_loop_mapping.name: 信息源名称 or 字段：rss_name or 字段：cli_title or 字段：folo_title
tech_insight_loop_mapping.url: RSS订阅源 or CLI RSS or Folo RSS or original HTTP URL; rsshub:// routes are converted to https://rsshub.app/{route}
tech_insight_loop_mapping.enabled: true for sources with HTTP/RSS/RSSHub fetch entries; false for metadata-only wx:// or missing-entry rows to avoid scheduler empty failures
tech_insight_loop_mapping.fetch_config.feed_url: RSS订阅源/CLI RSS/Folo RSS/RSSHub converted URL when present
tech_insight_loop_mapping.fetch_config.original_url: 原始URL, including wx:// for metadata-only governance records
tech_insight_loop_mapping.metadata.metadata_only: true when no current HTTP/RSS/RSSHub fetch entry exists
tech_insight_loop_mapping.metadata.needs_entry: same as metadata_only, used by source governance UI
tech_insight_loop_mapping.source_score: 字段：source_quality_score or 信息源综合评分 or 0
